text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is approaching, and
Matikanefukukitaru's worries over<n>her first
long-distance race begin to<n>mount.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Concerned for her, Silence Suzuka<n>offers some
words of<n>encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In her eyes, Matikanefukukitaru is a<n>lot more
amazing than she believes.<n>Suzuka tells her to
have a bit more<n>confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Gaining courage from those words,
Matikanefukukitaru vows to focus on<n>the Kikuka
Sho with a new, positive<n>mindset.
